files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 92ea1e2..04b8692 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -58,2 +58,3 @@
     "check:proof-loop-live": "node scripts/check-proof-loop-live.mjs",
+    "check:dashboard-proof-live": "node scripts/check-dashboard-proof-live.mjs",
     "check:proof-artifacts-live": "node scripts/check-proof-artifacts-live.mjs",
@@ -84,3 +85,3 @@
     "check:live-app-critical-health": "node scripts/check-live-app-critical-health.mjs",
-    "check:post-deploy-live": "npm run check:deploy-fingerprint && npm run check:google-auth-live && npm run check:buyer-routes-live && npm run check:live-db-health && npm run check:live:health && npm run smoke:buyer-auth && npm run check:operator-session-live && npm run check:operational-auth-live",
+    "check:post-deploy-live": "npm run check:deploy-fingerprint && npm run check:google-auth-live && npm run check:buyer-routes-live && npm run check:live-db-health && npm run check:live:health && npm run smoke:buyer-auth && npm run check:operator-session-live && npm run check:operational-auth-live && npm run check:dashboard-proof-live",
     "check:ship-live": "npm run check:live-is-current && npm run check:live-deploy-readiness && npm run check:post-deploy-live && npm run check:domain-cutover:authoritative",

files.reason: Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
